languages.text: "Примечательно, что семантическая вместимость третьей категории охватывает крайне широкий диапазон... сущностей". {n}Манипулус едва заметно улыбается.{/n} "Дальновидность Флота Осознание действительно велика".

"Notably, the semantic capacity of the third category encompasses an extremely wide range of... entities." {n}The Manipulus gives a barely noticeable smile.{/n} "The foresight of the Cognisance Fleet is truly remarkable."
languages.original_text: "Примечательно, что семантическая вместимость третьей категории охватывает крайне широкий диапазон... сущностей". {n}Манипулус едва заметно улыбается.{/n} "Дальновидность Флота Осознание действительно велика".

languages.text: «Notablemente, la capacidad semántica de la tercera categoría engloba una amplia gama de... seres». {n}El manipulus sonríe de forma apenas perceptible.{/n} «La capacidad de previsión de la Flota Conciencia es notable».
languages.original_text: "Notably, the semantic capacity of the third category encompasses an extremely wide range of... entities." {n}The Manipulus gives a barely noticeable smile.{/n} "The foresight of the Cognisance Fleet is truly remarkable."

traits.locale_text: «Notablemente, la capacidad semántica de la tercera categoría engloba una amplia gama de... seres». {n}El manipulus sonríe de forma apenas perceptible.{/n} «La capacidad de previsión de la Flota Conciencia es notable».

languages.text: “值得注意的是，第三类别的语义能力涵盖了极其广泛的……对象。”{n}操纵者露出几乎难以察觉的微笑。{/n}“真理开拓者舰队的远见着实令人赞叹。”
languages.original_text: "Notably, the semantic capacity of the third category encompasses an extremely wide range of... entities." {n}The Manipulus gives a barely noticeable smile.{/n} "The foresight of the Cognisance Fleet is truly remarkable."

traits.locale_text: “值得注意的是，第三类别的语义能力涵盖了极其广泛的……对象。”{n}操纵者露出几乎难以察觉的微笑。{/n}“真理开拓者舰队的远见着实令人赞叹。”

languages.text: "Die semantische Kapazität der dritten Kategorie umfasst eine extrem breite Palette von ... Wesenheiten." {n}Der Manipulus lächelt unmerklich.{/n} "Der Weitblick der Erkenntnisflotte ist wirklich bemerkenswert."
languages.original_text: "Notably, the semantic capacity of the third category encompasses an extremely wide range of... entities." {n}The Manipulus gives a barely noticeable smile.{/n} "The foresight of the Cognisance Fleet is truly remarkable."

traits.locale_text: "Die semantische Kapazität der dritten Kategorie umfasst eine extrem breite Palette von ... Wesenheiten." {n}Der Manipulus lächelt unmerklich.{/n} "Der Weitblick der Erkenntnisflotte ist wirklich bemerkenswert."

languages.text: « La capacité sémantique de la troisième option englobe un éventail extrêmement vaste de... d'entités potentielles, {n}fait remarquer le manipulus en esquissant l'ombre d'un sourire.{/n} Décidément, la Flotte de la Connaissance a pensé à tout. »
languages.original_text: "Notably, the semantic capacity of the third category encompasses an extremely wide range of... entities." {n}The Manipulus gives a barely noticeable smile.{/n} "The foresight of the Cognisance Fleet is truly remarkable."

traits.locale_text: « La capacité sémantique de la troisième option englobe un éventail extrêmement vaste de... d'entités potentielles, {n}fait remarquer le manipulus en esquissant l'ombre d'un sourire.{/n} Décidément, la Flotte de la Connaissance a pensé à tout. »

languages.text: "Üçüncü kategorinin anlamsal kapasitesinin son derece geniş bir... Varlık yelpazesini kapsaması dikkate değer." {n}Manipülus, zar zor fark edilen bir gülümseme takınıyor.{/n} "Malumat Filosu'nun öngörüsü gerçekten olağanüstü."
languages.original_text: "Notably, the semantic capacity of the third category encompasses an extremely wide range of... entities." {n}The Manipulus gives a barely noticeable smile.{/n} "The foresight of the Cognisance Fleet is truly remarkable."

traits.locale_text: "Üçüncü kategorinin anlamsal kapasitesinin son derece geniş bir... Varlık yelpazesini kapsaması dikkate değer." {n}Manipülus, zar zor fark edilen bir gülümseme takınıyor.{/n} "Malumat Filosu'nun öngörüsü gerçekten olağanüstü."

languages.text: 「特に、第三のカテゴリーの語彙能力は、非常に幅広い... 存在を網羅しているのです。」{n}マニピュラスは、わずかに微笑む.{/n}「認知艦隊の遠見力は、本当に素晴らしいですね。」
languages.original_text: "Notably, the semantic capacity of the third category encompasses an extremely wide range of... entities." {n}The Manipulus gives a barely noticeable smile.{/n} "The foresight of the Cognisance Fleet is truly remarkable."
